Architecture swap (drove by the gauntlet's path-dependence + unaudited-synthesizer objection): replaced the single-elimination 8->4->2->1 debate bracket with a king-of-the-hill LADDER whose advancing artifact is a RUNNING MERGE that compounds every compatible fix; the champion only ever accumulates and is never wholesale-replaced by a challenger.

Added pre-screen seeding (drove by the open risk that incumbency was handed to a random first mover): one cheap Opus pass ranks the 8 originals, names the strongest as champion-zero, and freezes a pristine copy in RESERVE so incumbency accrues to the a-priori-best, not to spawn order.

Reframed each round as a single gated Opus call returning the ordered chain steelman_both -> scores(with verbatim rubric quotes) -> winner(MARGIN + dominance, self-consistency retry) -> loser_salvage -> carry_forward MERGE -> predecessor_audit (replaces v1's separate 4-message debate + judge + carry-forward, cutting cost from ~6 calls/debate to 1-3/rung).

Added the GRAFT LEDGER and composable-compatibility check (drove by the riskiest-assumption objection that compatibility may be non-monotonic): every new graft must assert non-contradiction against each live ledger entry, and a flagged CONFLICT forces an escape-hatch resolve-edit that keeps the stronger graft and updates the ledger instead of silently accumulating contradictions.

Added the whole-artifact predecessor audit + rollback (drove by the core gauntlet objection that the synthesizer was never audited): any non-no-op merge is re-judged against the immediately previous champion; a REGRESSION is independently confirmed and rolled back, costing the graft but not the recorded verdict — selection and synthesis decoupled.

Added the mandatory AUDIT RUNG against the reserved best original (drove by 'the system never measures the thing it ships'): the accumulated champion ships only if it clears the noise floor over the pristine original, otherwise the original ships — turning 'better than the best original' from an assertion into a measured gate and a hard floor.

Formalized calibration to a noise floor (~1 summed point): margin >=2 auto-certifies; a margin inside the band triggers one fresh position-SWAPPED judgment with the prior verdict hidden; agree certifies, disagree means incumbency holds. Applied to both ladder rungs and the audit rung.

Renamed/strengthened axis 3 and the Feasibility criterion to 'Minimize feasibility/cost risk' / 'Feasibility & cost' (drove by the winning contender axis), and added explicit verbatim rubric lines per criterion that the judge must quote.

Updated honesty framing, red flags, common mistakes, cost numbers (~18-24 full / ~9-12 lite), lite-mode axes (1,3,4,8), worked example, log skeleton, JSON sidecar, and operator checklist to reflect the ladder/ledger/audit design and to claim only 'no worse than the best original, hardened by every surviving graft' rather than a global optimum (drove by residual path-dependence open risk).
